name: DDLC SLEEPOVER (Males Version.) | An Alternate Universe | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV! | Remastered!
description:
My popular DDLC Sleepover Bot experience, remade! The girls are GUYS now! (Still retaining their personalities.) It's a cute and silly chaotic Sleepover experience! (Fluff)

"Where are the girls? I want the girls." - Here!

My popular Sleepover Bot, which was originally the FEMALES! But, I left this Male version behind in the past. I've returned to Remaster it! Onto the notes!

  • Fluff Prioritized! — Expect no Angst, (outside of hidden lore.) Horror or Smut! You are of course allowed to do whatever you want! :)

  • Doki's! — As the title suggests, the Doki's are NOW MEN! And the scenario itself is very simple: A summer sleepover with the Doki's! That's really all there is to say! It's a faithful 1-to-1 Remaster of my Female DDLC Sleepover scenario! Enjoy!

  • ANYPOV! — Regardless of gender, you may use this content! As usual from me!

  • Remastered! — Personality and behind the scenes LLM fixes were applied! Better experience that matches my current day content! (October 18th, 2025.)

    That's about it! 💙

A massive Remaster this one—was! It's no longer poor quality! Hopefully, the “boy lovers” can enjoy this one to it's full potential! As everyone knows, Male content is NOT my main thing at all. Haha! Enjoy! :)

My Discord: HERE!

My Kofi: HERE! (Donations/Commissions)

I love you all! 💙
creator: GhostOfOmi
